failures.description: The agent failed because the catalog search dependency timed out during the ProductCatalogSearch call, so it never obtained the product data needed to identify the cheapest available electric kettle.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The first failure appears at index 3, where the agent attempts a valid ProductCatalogSearch tool call and receives an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: "catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms" with type "CatalogServiceTimeoutError". This is not a malformed invocation, because the arguments are well-formed and match the earlier plan. It is also not primarily an intent or planning issue: the agent correctly understood the user's goal and selected the right tool/query. Looking ahead, the failure is not resolved; the Executor simply returns "Task could not be completed," and the Evaluator confirms rejection based on the timeout. Therefore the root cause is an unresolved system/tool connectivity failure at index 3.
